holdings.infoBox: GMEY is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax GME Option Income Strategy ETF (GMEY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the GameStop Corp. stock (GME) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys GMEY was launched on Sep 8, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
